source_rationale: KRT17 is a basal/squamous cytokeratin strongly associated with aberrant basaloid differentiation in lung
KRT7 is a simple epithelial keratin marking the epithelial identity of aberrant basaloid cells
KRT19 marks simple epithelial cells and is upregulated in aberrant basaloid populations in fibrotic lung
TP63 is a master transcription factor of basal cell identity, defining the basaloid phenotype
E-cadherin (CDH1) marks the epithelial character of these cells undergoing partial EMT
ITGB6 encodes integrin beta-6, a TGF-beta activating integrin characteristic of aberrant basaloid cells in IPF
MMP7 is a matrix metalloproteinase strongly associated with aberrant basaloid cells and IPF pathology
GDF15 is a stress-response cytokine highly expressed in aberrant basaloid cells in fibrotic lung
TROP2 (TACSTD2) is an epithelial surface antigen enriched in aberrant basaloid cells
SOX4 is a transcription factor associated with EMT and progenitor-like states in aberrant basaloid cells
Fibronectin (FN1) reflects the mesenchymal/fibrotic features of aberrant basaloid cells
LAMC2 encodes laminin gamma-2, a basement membrane component marking aberrant basaloid cells in fibrosis
FABP4 is a fatty acid binding protein and canonical marker of alveolar macrophages reflecting lipid metabolism
MARCO is a scavenger receptor specifically expressed on alveolar macrophages for pathogen clearance
MSR1 (CD204) is a macrophage scavenger receptor highly expressed in alveolar macrophages
PPARG is a master transcription factor driving alveolar macrophage differentiation and lipid metabolism
MRC1 (CD206) is a mannose receptor characteristic of tissue-resident alveolar macrophages
APOC1 is an apolipoprotein highly expressed in alveolar macrophages reflecting their lipid handling function
C1QA is a complement component produced by alveolar macrophages for immune surveillance
C1QB is a complement subunit co-expressed with C1QA as a hallmark of tissue-resident macrophages
VSIG4 is a complement receptor specific to tissue-resident macrophages including alveolar macrophages
APOE is highly expressed in alveolar macrophages and involved in lipid transport and immune modulation
AGER (RAGE) is the canonical marker of alveolar type 1 (AT1) cells in the lung
EMP2 is an epithelial membrane protein highly enriched in AT1 cells
Caveolin-1 is essential for AT1 cell caveolae formation and gas exchange function
HOPX is a transcription factor and established marker of AT1 cell differentiation
RTKN2 is a recently identified specific marker of human AT1 cells
Claudin-18 is a tight junction protein specifically expressed in alveolar epithelial cells including AT1
Caveolin-2 co-localizes with CAV1 in AT1 cells and supports caveolae structure
SPOCK2 is a proteoglycan enriched in AT1 cells involved in alveolar structure
Aquaporin-4 is a water channel expressed in AT1 cells facilitating fluid transport
CLIC5 is a chloride channel enriched in AT1 cells contributing to ion transport
Surfactant protein C is the canonical and most specific marker of alveolar type 2 (AT2) cells
Surfactant protein B is produced by AT2 cells and essential for surfactant function
Surfactant protein A1 is a collectin produced by AT2 cells for innate immune defense
Surfactant protein A2 is co-expressed with SFTPA1 in AT2 cells
Surfactant protein D is secreted by AT2 cells for host defense in the alveolus
Napsin A is an aspartyl protease involved in surfactant protein processing in AT2 cells
ABCA3 is a lipid transporter essential for lamellar body formation in AT2 cells
LAMP3 (DC-LAMP) marks lamellar bodies in AT2 cells and is a specific AT2 marker
SLPI is a secretory leukocyte protease inhibitor highly expressed in AT2 cells
LPCAT1 is a phospholipid remodeling enzyme critical for surfactant biosynthesis in AT2 cells
CD74 (invariant chain) is highly expressed in B cells for MHC class II antigen presentation
MS4A1 (CD20) is the canonical B cell surface marker used clinically for B cell identification
CD79A is a component of the B cell receptor signaling complex and definitive B cell marker
BANK1 is a B cell scaffold protein involved in BCR signaling, specific to B lymphocytes
PAX5 is a master transcription factor essential for B cell lineage commitment and identity
EBF1 is a transcription factor critical for early B cell development and maintenance
BLK is a Src family kinase specifically expressed in B cells for BCR signaling
TNFRSF13C (BAFF-R) is a B cell survival receptor essential for mature B cell maintenance
CD37 is a tetraspanin predominantly expressed on B cells involved in immune signaling
BCL11A is a zinc finger transcription factor required for B lymphopoiesis
KRT17 is a canonical basal cell keratin in airway epithelium
KRT5 is a definitive basal cell marker in stratified and pseudostratified epithelia
KRT15 marks basal progenitor cells in the airway epithelium
TP63 is the master transcription factor defining basal cell identity in epithelial tissues
MIR205HG hosts miR-205, a microRNA specifically expressed in basal epithelial cells
S100A2 is a calcium-binding protein enriched in basal cells of the airway
Integrin alpha-6 mediates basal cell adhesion to the basement membrane
Integrin beta-4 pairs with ITGA6 in hemidesmosomes anchoring basal cells
EGFR is highly expressed in basal cells driving proliferation and self-renewal
Galectin-7 is specifically expressed in stratified epithelial basal cells
DNAH12 encodes a dynein heavy chain essential for ciliary motility in ciliated cells
CFAP299 is a cilia and flagella associated protein specific to motile ciliated cells
RSPH1 is a radial spoke head protein essential for ciliary motility
CAPS (calcyphosine) is a calcium-binding protein enriched in ciliated epithelial cells
TPPP3 is a tubulin polymerization promoting protein specific to ciliated cells
DNAH9 is an outer dynein arm heavy chain required for ciliary beating
HYDIN is a central pair protein essential for ciliary motility
CDHR3 is a cadherin-related protein specifically expressed on ciliated airway cells
Sentan localizes to the tips of motile cilia and is a specific ciliated cell marker
Pitchfork (PIFO) is involved in cilia disassembly and is specific to ciliated cells
DYNLRB2 is a dynein light chain specific to motile cilia
S100A8 (calgranulin A) is a canonical marker of classical monocytes and neutrophils
S100A9 (calgranulin B) forms a heterodimer with S100A8, highly expressed in classical monocytes
Versican is a proteoglycan strongly upregulated in classical monocytes
Ficolin-1 is a pattern recognition molecule and established marker of classical monocytes
S100A12 (calgranulin C) is specifically expressed in classical monocytes and granulocytes
CD14 is the canonical surface marker defining classical monocytes (CD14++CD16-)
Thrombospondin-1 is highly expressed in classical monocytes involved in inflammation
NAMPT (visfatin) is an inflammatory mediator highly expressed in classical monocytes
PLAUR (uPAR) is upregulated in activated classical monocytes during inflammation

SCGB1A1 (CC10/CC16) is the canonical secretory marker of club (Clara) cells
SCGB3A2 is a secretoglobin family member highly expressed in club cells

WFDC2 (HE4) is a secretory protein enriched in club cells of the airway
MMP7 is a matrix metalloproteinase expressed by club cells in the airway
CXCL17 is a mucosal chemokine produced by club cells for immune homeostasis
Matrix Gla protein is expressed in club cells of the conducting airways

WDFY4 is required for cross-presentation and specifically expressed in cDC1
IDO1 is an immunomodulatory enzyme enriched in cDC1 for tryptophan catabolism

IRF8 is a transcription factor essential for cDC1 development and identity
CPVL is a carboxypeptidase enriched in cDC1 involved in antigen processing
ZBTB46 is a transcription factor specifically expressed in conventional dendritic cells
ID2 is a transcription factor required for cDC1 lineage specification
DNASE1L3 is expressed in cDC1 and involved in processing of extracellular DNA

CCL17 (TARC) is a chemokine specifically produced by cDC2 to attract Th2 cells

FCGR2B (CD32B) is an inhibitory Fc receptor expressed on cDC2

CD3D is a component of the TCR complex confirming T cell identity
RUNX3 is a transcription factor essential for CD8+ T cell differentiation
KLRD1 (CD94) is an NK receptor expressed on cytotoxic T cells

ENTPD1 (CD39) is an ectonucleotidase highly expressed on Langerhans cells

CD1C is expressed on Langerhans cells for lipid antigen presentation
Decorin is a proteoglycan and canonical marker of fibroblasts in connective tissue

Fibulin-1 is an ECM glycoprotein produced by fibroblasts

PI16 is a marker of universal fibroblast progenitors in multiple tissues
THY1 (CD90) is a GPI-anchored glycoprotein and established fibroblast surface marker

MMP2 is a matrix metalloproteinase produced by fibroblasts for ECM remodeling
SCGB3A1 is a secretoglobin highly expressed in goblet and secretory airway cells
SCGB1A1 is expressed in goblet cells of the airway epithelium
MUC5B is a gel-forming mucin and canonical marker of mucus-producing goblet cells

WFDC2 (HE4) is a secretory protein enriched in goblet cells

KLRD1 (CD94) is an NK receptor expressed on ILC subsets with cytotoxic function
Granulysin is a cytotoxic effector molecule in NK-like ILCs

KLRC1 (NKG2A) is an inhibitory NK receptor expressed on ILC1/NK-like cells
